subcodes.first_line: The verses have been revealed, and there hath appeared in the realm that which all created things are powerless to comprehend. Lo, the horizon of inner meanings hath dawned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهر فی الملک ما عجزت عن ادراکه الکائنات قد لاح افق المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
